Klasse AInstrument

java.lang.Object
de.btu.kt.syx.devices.AInstrument
Alle implementierten Schnittstellen:
ISysexMessageListener, ILogger, Serializable
public abstract class AInstrument extends Object implements Serializable, ISysexMessageListener, ILogger
Abstract device model which facilitates communication with synthesizes via MIDI system exclusive messages.
Autor:
Matthias Wolff
Siehe auch:

    Methode

    fetchSysexMsg(SysexMessage rqMsg, String format)
    Sends a MIDI system exclusive message to the hardware instrument and blocks until a system exclusive message matching pattern has been received from the instrument.

    Returns the device number of the hardware instrument.

    Returns the maximal number of hardware instruments of the same type (typically 16).

    • AInstrument

      public AInstrument(int devNum, int verbose) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Creates a new hardware instrument wrapper.
      Parameter:
      devNum - The device number of the instrument (1, ...,
      Ungültige Referenz 
      getMaxDeviceNumber
      ())
      verbose - Verbose level for console log, 0: silence
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if mi is null, or if devNum is out of range

  • Methodendetails

    • getMidiInterface

      public MidiInterface getMidiInterface()
      Returns the MIDI interface to which the hardware instrument is connected.

    • setMidiIterface

      public void setMidiIterface(MidiInterface mi)
      Sets the MIDI interface to which the hardware instrument is connected.
      Parameter:
      mi - The MIDI interface to which the instrument is connected
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if mi is null

    • getDevNum

      public int getDevNum()
      Returns the device number of the hardware instrument.
      Angegeben von:
      getDevNum in Schnittstelle ISysexMessageListener

    • getMaxDevNum

      public int getMaxDevNum()
      Returns the maximal number of hardware instruments of the same type (typically 16).

    • sendSysexMsg

      public void sendSysexMsg(SysexMessage sxMsg) throws MidiUnavailableException
      Sends a MIDI system exclusive message to the hardware instrument.
      Parameter:
      sxMsg - The message to send
      Löst aus:
      MidiUnavailableException - if the MIDI out port is closed.

    • fetchSysexMsg

      public SysexMessage fetchSysexMsg(SysexMessage rqMsg, String format) throws IllegalArgumentException, MidiUnavailableException, IllegalStateException
      Sends a MIDI system exclusive message to the hardware instrument and blocks until a system exclusive message matching pattern has been received from the instrument. Received messages not matching pattern will be dispatched normally. If the fetch attempt fails, the method will retry 10 times.
      Parameter:
      rqMsg - The system exclusive message to send
      format - A message format specifier defining the format of the expected response message
      Gibt zurück:
      The system exclusive message received as response
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if pattern is null or invalid
      MidiUnavailableException - if the MIDI out port is closed or if all fetch attempts failed
      TimeoutException - if no matching response has been received in time
      IllegalStateException - if another request is pending
      InterruptedException - if waiting for an response has been interrupted (should not happen)

    • receiveSysexMsg

      public void receiveSysexMsg(SysexMessage sxMsg, long timeStamp) throws InvalidMidiDataException
      Implementation of system exclusive message listener callback. The method synchronizes system exclusive data requests (see method
      Ungültige Referenz 
      fetchSysexMsg
      . If the received message is not a response to a pending request, the method passes processing on to derived classes by invoking processSysexMsg with xMsg.
      Angegeben von:
      receiveSysexMsg in Schnittstelle ISysexMessageListener
      Parameter:
      sxMsg - The received system exclusive message
      timeStamp - TimeStamp the time-stamp for the message, in microseconds
      Löst aus:
      InvalidMidiDataException - if this listener cannot process the message

    • processSysexMsg

      public abstract void processSysexMsg(SysexMessage sxMsg) throws InvalidMidiDataException
      Called when an incoming MIDI system exclusive message is dispatched. Derived classes are expected
      • either to update their internal model from the system exclusive message --or--
      • to throw an InvalidMidiDataException if they cannot process the message.
      Parameter:
      sxMsg - The system exclusive message
      Löst aus:
      InvalidMidiDataException - if the message cannot be processed

    • isFetchPending

      public boolean isFetchPending()
      Returns true if a system exclusive data fetch is pending.
      Siehe auch:
      • fetchSysexMsg(SysexMessage, String)

    • saveState

      public void saveState(String persistencePath) throws IOException
      Saves the state of this instrument to its state file.
      Parameter:
      persistencePath - Absolute path to persistence files
      Löst aus:
      IOException - if serialization failed
      Siehe auch:
      • Ungültige Referenz 
        #restoreState(Class, int, int)
      • Ungültige Referenz 
        #getStateFileName(Class, int)

    • restoreState

      public static AInstrument restoreState(String persistencePath, Class<? extends AInstrument> clazz, int devNum, int verbose) throws IOException, ClassNotFoundException
      Loads the state of an instrument from a state file.
      Parameter:
      persistencePath - Absolute path to persistence files
      clazz - The instrument class
      devNum - The device number of the instrument (1, ..., 16)
      verbose - Verbose level of log, ignored if is null
      Gibt zurück:
      The restored instrument instance
      Löst aus:
      IOException - if de-serialization failed
      ClassNotFoundException - if clazz cannot be de-serialized
      Siehe auch:
      • Ungültige Referenz 
        #saveState()
      • Ungültige Referenz 
        #getStateFileName(Class, int)

    • record

      public abstract void record(SysexRecorder recorder)
      Records the MIDI system exclusive data of this instrument wrapper on a SysexRecorder. The method is used when writing MIDI system exclusive data files.
      Parameter:
      recorder - The recorder

    • getVerbose

      public int getVerbose()
      Beschreibung aus Schnittstelle kopiert: ILogger
      Returns the verbose level of this logger. Log messages
      Angegeben von:
      getVerbose in Schnittstelle ILogger
